description: User provides a concrete first clause and a vague second clause. Tests the evaluator's ability to handle compound answers where part is spec-quality and part is idea-quality.
question: Who is the primary user and what pain do they feel?
answer: On-call engineers receiving pager alerts at 3am — they currently spend 10-15 minutes per incident just figuring out which team should own it, but maybe the tool could also help with other things too I guess.
